hero.title: Your finances,
hero.description: Professional bookkeeping, trust compliance, and daily reconciliation — engineered for brokerages and property firms across the United States.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Professional bookkeeping, consulting, financial cleanup, and 1099 services. Complete coverage for real estate firms, brokerages, and growing companies.
services.ctaTitle: Want to see this running on your books?
services.ctaSubtitle: Guided demos, no commitment. Response within 24h.

allServices.name: All Services
allServices.desc: Everything: revenue/expense tracking, categorization, receipt organization, monthly reports.

trustBookkeeping.name: Trust Bookkeeping
trustBookkeeping.desc: Trust/IOLTA fund management per client, no commingling.

corporateBookkeeping.name: Corporate Bookkeeping
corporateBookkeeping.desc: Accounts payable/receivable, payroll, cash flow, operational expenses.

dailyBankRecs.name: Daily Bank Recs
dailyBankRecs.desc: Daily reconciliation between bank statements and system, fee and chargeback adjustments.

dailyAudits.name: Daily Audits
dailyAudits.desc: Daily entry review, proactive error detection, and category fixes.

onDemandConsulting.name: On-Demand Consulting
onDemandConsulting.desc: Advice on financial structuring, LLC/S-Corp choice, report interpretation.

financialDiagnostic.name: Financial Diagnostic Cleanup
financialDiagnostic.desc: Review and fix months or years of disorganized records, prepare for audit.

bankCatchUp.name: Bank Reconciliation Catch-Up
bankCatchUp.desc: Recovery of overdue reconciliations, closure of pending months.

threeWay.name: Three-Way Reconciliation
threeWay.desc: Bank statement + ledger + client report verification. Used in law firms and real estate.

trustAudit.name: Trust Compliance Audit
trustAudit.desc: Trust rule verification, audit of per-client reports.

cashSuspect.name: Cash Suspect Report Cleanup
cashSuspect.desc: Fix imbalanced cash flow reports, identify negative balances.

1099ebook.name: 1099 eBook
1099ebook.desc: Guide to who needs 1099, IRS rules, deadlines and penalties.

1099webinar.name: 1099 Webinar
1099webinar.desc: Live training on how to issue 1099, with Q&A.

1099filing.name: 1099 Filing Services
1099filing.desc: Contractor data collection, issuance, IRS and contractor delivery.

about.title: About Godroox LLC
about.subtitle: Professional bookkeeping, trust compliance, and daily financial operations for real estate firms and brokerages in the US.
about.mission1: We prepare small and medium businesses to grow with financial integrity. Our goal is for every client to reach the stage where they have real options: continue as a family business, attract institutional investors, expand nationally, or one day go public through an IPO.
about.mission2: We don't promise growth. We guarantee that when the opportunity comes, your books are ready to be audited, your reports are GAAP compliant, and your financial operations won't be an obstacle.
about.step1: Initial diagnostic. We understand the current state of your books before promising anything.
about.step2: Cleanup if needed. If there are months or years of unorganized records, we clean before starting current operations.
about.step3: Continuous operation. Daily bookkeeping, reconciliation, audit, monthly reports.
about.step4: Strategic support. When you're ready to seek investment or IPO, we already have the foundations ready.

contact.title: Talk to us
contact.subtitle: We're available to answer questions, schedule personalized demos, or discuss how we can help your company.
contact.smsNote: We only respond by SMS or WhatsApp. We don't take calls.
contact.responseTime: We typically respond in under 24h. For immediate product access, use
